title: exothostemon paludosus
side_effects: Exothostemon paludosus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems. Consuming the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can also cause eye irritation, redness, and blurred vision. In severe cases, improper use of Exothostemon paludosus can result in anaphylaxis, a life-threatening allergic reaction that requires immediate medical attention.
